results.description: Clean-slate repro: working tree clean, no stale /tmp/onex-l1-proof-* dirs
results.evidence: rm -rf /tmp/onex-l1-proof-* → no matches found (none existed). Working tree git status --short → only the staged proof receipt.

results.description: ./scripts/run_l1_proof.sh exits 0 on first run from clean dir
results.evidence: Clean run at 10:59:49 UTC 2026-04-16. Script exit 0. Total runtime well under 1 second. Full log captured in docs/proofs/2026-04-16-L1-runtime-proof.md.

results.description: Negative control passes: docker ps | wc -l == 1 (header only), pgrep kafka/redpanda/postgres all empty
results.evidence: docker ps count: 1 (header-only, no containers). pgrep kafka: none. pgrep redpanda: none. pgrep postgres: none. Confirmed during the proof run.

results.description: State file asserts via Python one-liner: PASS
results.evidence: State file content: {"result": "completed", "exit_code": 0, "workflow": ".../node_merge_sweep/contract.yaml"}. Assertion via test_runtime_local_runs_merge_sweep_with_real_payload (tests/test_proof_runtime_local_merge_sweep.py) — all required fields present, values match expected.

results.description: Proof receipt committed with full run details
results.evidence: docs/proofs/2026-04-16-L1-runtime-proof.md captures uname -a, python --version, uv --version, all three worktree SHAs (omnibase_core da57e312, omnimarket dfbb137, omni_home 94bc97c8), negative control state, full runtime output, and acceptance criteria mapping. Also notes the line 'RuntimeLocal: terminal event received (status=success)' confirming the runtime-synthesized terminal round-tripped the bus.
Per proof receipt acceptance table: Gate 1-5 (L1A) ✓, Gate 6 (L1B) ✓, Gate 7 (CLI migration) ✓. Every plan-level gate maps to a passing test or verified behavior.

results.description: Proof boundary honestly stated — receipt cannot be cited as hermetic reproducibility
results.evidence: Receipt's 'What this receipt does NOT prove' section explicitly notes: not fully offline (gh/GitHub), not cross-machine reproducibility, not universal packaging-convention law. Aligns with plan Standalone Proof Boundary.
